nasb.text: For the ruthless will come to an end and the scorner will be finished, Indeed all who are intent on doing evil will be cut off;

esv.text: For the ruthless shall come to nothing and the scoffer cease, and all who watch to do evil shall be cut off,

cnv.text: 因為強暴人歸於無有，好譏笑人的必被滅絕； 所有意圖行惡的，必被剪除。

ccb.text: 残暴之徒必消失， 嘲讽者必绝迹， 所有心怀不轨者必被铲除。

csbs.text: 因为强横者必归于无有， 讥讽者必灭绝， 所有伺机做坏事的都必被剪除。
